text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: So you see, this is Rhodonite and the Dreamstone. I'm sorry for lying to you all.

text_block_list.name: El & Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You mean... th-the spring and the river and the forest we saw are all
in this book?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
...Huh? Y-yes, it's all in here. There's also a fight with the kelpie and a
scene where they bargain with a cù sìth...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
H-hold on a minute. We need to get the second hint before the day
ends. Can you tell us more later? I'm... also curious about it.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...G-gladly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After finding the second hint without any problems, they gather in
their tree house to read the novel together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, so there were fairies called the peallaidh in the Lonely River.
Whoa, they lure people close and then pull them into the river?!
That's scary...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is this where we're going tomorrow? Oberon's Palace? A glowing
blue cave... Ah, I can't wait!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so the night grows late... The next day, the five adventurers
arrive at the final obstacle, Oberon's Palace.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The open sea, the white clouds, aaand... the stone door leading to
the cave! At a glance, it looks like just your average stone slab, but
that won't fool me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, this must be the right place.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
In the book, they opened the door by placing the two stones they
found at the Lonely River and Ghillie Dhu's Garden on a pillar, right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I don't see anything that looks like a pillar around here,
though... Instead, there are some dents in the surface of the door
slab.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
There's a hole in the bottom-right, the middle, and the left. There's
already a stone in the bottom-right one.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
How about we try putting our stones in the two open spots? What do
you think, Rob Ro―hm? What's up? You look pleased as punch!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
What?! Um, no! N-n-nothing at all! I think that's a good idea, Taiki.
The shape and size look like a perfect fit.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Okay! If I may do the honors... This one goes here, and this one, right
here. Done! Open sesame!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The door glows, and with a slow rumbling noise, it starts to open... Or
at least, that's what they thought would happen.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hm. Maybe they were meant to go the other way round. Or was it the
order I placed them in?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Possibly. Let's try every variation we can think of.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Nooo! We've tried everything! We even splashed it with water and
dug around in the sand for clues, but still nothing!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I'm at a complete loss... Is there something we're missing?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
The people fishing over there are probably locals, don't ya think?
They might know something! Hey, hey! Excuse me, guys!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What?! No way. There she goes!

text_block_list.name: Local Fisherman A
text_block_list.text:
I see. A treasure hunt, huh? Now you mention it, I feel like I saw
something engraved at the bottom of that big rock over there.

text_block_list.name: Local Fisherman B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you mean those strange swirly letters we can't understand? I think
it's just graffiti or something, though.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: So, that's what I heard. Oh, this must be it! It is all swirly! What do you think, Rob Roy?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: This is the language used in Rhodonite. Let's see... It says...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? You can read it?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
W-well, I spent some time deciphering it once so I could understand
the writing in the illustrations...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Um... "Ye who decipher this, miss not the fleeting chance when it
shines." That's what it says.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Amazing! You're a genius!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Well, it appears the door only opens for a short time. But...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
(It's already quite dark. We need to go through the forest to get
back. I can't put us all in danger again like last time.)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...Unfortunately, I think we've already missed our chance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Rob Roy has been deep in thought this whole time. Although she
said we should go home, I have a feeling she doesn't really want to
give up.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (Okay. Right now, I have my mask on, so...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
R-Rob Roy, are you sure about this? Our bus leaves first thing in the
morning tomorrow. If we give up now, that's it...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no, it's fine! I'm happy we even made it this far. And I wouldn't
dream of putting you all in danger again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
They do say it's dangerous to go out in the forest at night, but this is
a campsite. The paths are clear and well-lit.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
So, do you want to stay here a little longer and try and figure it out?
If we come up with nothing, we go home. If we get an inkling, we go
back to the beach. What do you think?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm all for it! I don't want to give up now after coming this far!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh... Then... in that case, let's try a little longer. Thank you all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Three stones, in the shape of a triangle... "Ye who decipher this, miss
not the fleeting chance when it shines."

text_block_list.name: All
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Um, not like this is an answer or anything, but... I feel like I've seen
this triangle somewhere before.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: You have?! Where?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That's the thing, I don't remember. I feel like I saw it when I was lying
down... Wait.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh. Oh? Oh! OH! That's it! The Summer Triangle!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah! Those stones were in the exact same shape as the Summer
Triangle! So what does it mean?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh? Rob Roy?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ("When it shines." It was referring to nighttime, when the Summer Triangle is visible!)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
("Miss not the fleeting chance." Which means the door only opens for
a short time. This is our last chance! I have to hurry!)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant! The stones on the door are glowing like stars!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: It's opening! Thank goodness, we made it! We did it!
